mapper.sql: CONT_NO, ORG_NO, CONT_SEQ, BRCH_POLICY_TYPE_CD, SAVE_CAN_YN, USE_CAN_YN, CONT_ORG_STS_CD, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from cont_org
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into cont_org (CONT_NO, ORG_NO, CONT_SEQ, BRCH_POLICY_TYPE_CD, SAVE_CAN_YN, USE_CAN_YN, CONT_ORG_STS_CD, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT) values (#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{brchPolicyTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contOrgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into cont_org
CONT_NO,
ORG_NO,
CONT_SEQ,
BRCH_POLICY_TYPE_CD,
SAVE_CAN_YN,
USE_CAN_YN,
CONT_ORG_STS_CD,
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT,
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{brchPolicyTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{contOrgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update cont_org
CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_SEQ = #{row.contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BRCH_POLICY_TYPE_CD = #{row.brchPolicyTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SAVE_CAN_YN = #{row.saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_CAN_YN = #{row.useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONT_ORG_STS_CD = #{row.contOrgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT = #{row.totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT = #{row.totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update cont_org set CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_SEQ = #{row.contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BRCH_POLICY_TYPE_CD = #{row.brchPolicyTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SAVE_CAN_YN = #{row.saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_CAN_YN = #{row.useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_ORG_STS_CD = #{row.contOrgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT = #{row.totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT = #{row.totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update cont_org
CONT_SEQ = #{contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BRCH_POLICY_TYPE_CD = #{brchPolicyTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SAVE_CAN_YN = #{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_CAN_YN = #{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONT_ORG_STS_CD = #{contOrgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT = #{totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT = #{totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update cont_org set CONT_SEQ = #{contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BRCH_POLICY_TYPE_CD = #{brchPolicyTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SAVE_CAN_YN = #{saveCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_CAN_YN = #{useCanYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_ORG_STS_CD = #{contOrgStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT = #{totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT = #{totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}
